info.name: Mobile Metadata & Filters
info.description: APIs to fetch related Categories, Sub Categories, Project Types, and Sub Project Types for cascading dropdowns in the mobile application based on unique_id.

request.description: Fetch a list of all active Categories.

item.name: 2. Get Sub Categories By Category Unique ID

request.description: Fetch Sub Categories linked to a specific Category unique_id.

item.name: 3. Get Project Types By Sub Category Unique ID

request.description: Fetch Project Types that are mapped to a specific Sub Category unique_id.

item.name: 4. Get Sub Project Types By Project Type Unique ID

request.description: Fetch Sub Project Types linked to a specific Project Type unique_id.
